title: Don’t think you can afford Camp Barney? With this new offer, now you can!
excerpt: Barney Beginnings provides significant savings and an extended payment plan, making Jewish overnight camp more affordable, thanks to the support of a generous donor. *Offer Details: Open to new, not previously enrolled rising 3rd-6th graders in the Atlanta area Available only for June sessions – 2-week or 4-week options Open to families with a household […]
contentHtml:
Barney Beginnings provides significant savings and an extended payment plan, making Jewish overnight camp more affordable, thanks to the support of a generous donor.

$249/month*

for 12 months

4-week Session

$159/month*

for 12 months

2-week Session

*Offer Details:

    • Open to new, notiously enrolled rising 3rd-6th graders in the Atlanta area
    • Available only for June sessions – 2-week or 4-week options
    • Open to families with a household income of less than $125,000; household income must be verified every year to be eligible for this offer
    • MJCCA summer membership included
    • Open to campers who are socially and emotionally ready for an overnight camp experience
    • Cannot be combined with other offers or financial aid from the MJCCA
    • Offer can be used at any tine for first time campers who meet the criteria listed above; price is guaranteed for first three years
    • Available only if space allows, on a first-come, first-served basis
    • Canteen fee of $140 for a 4-week session or $70 for a 2-week session will be charged upon registration – payment plans will begin on the 15th of each month
    • Monthly Payment Plan:
      •  4-Week Session – payment of $249/month for 12 months
      •  2-Week Session – payment of $159/month for 12 months
    • If you receive the One Happy Camper grant, it will be applied to your final payments

To take advantage of the Barney Beginnings offer, please contact Barbara Vahaba, Financial Assistance Coordinator, at 678.812.4142.
contentText:
Barney Beginnings provides significant savings and an extended payment plan, making Jewish overnight camp more affordable, thanks to the support of a generous donor.

$249/month*

for 12 months

4-week Session

$159/month*

for 12 months

2-week Session

*Offer Details:

Open to new, notiously enrolled rising 3rd-6th graders in the Atlanta area

Available only for June sessions – 2-week or 4-week options

Open to families with a household income of less than $125,000; household income must be verified every year to be eligible for this offer

MJCCA summer membership included

Open to campers who are socially and emotionally ready for an overnight camp experience

Cannot be combined with other offers or financial aid from the MJCCA

Offer can be used at any tine for first time campers who meet the criteria listed above; price is guaranteed for first three years

Available only if space allows, on a first-come, first-served basis

Canteen fee of $140 for a 4-week session or $70 for a 2-week session will be charged upon registration – payment plans will begin on the 15th of each month

Monthly Payment Plan:

 4-Week Session – payment of $249/month for 12 months

 2-Week Session – payment of $159/month for 12 months

If you receive the One Happy Camper grant, it will be applied to your final payments

To take advantage of the Barney Beginnings offer, please contact 
Barbara Vahaba
, Financial Assistance Coordinator, at 678.812.4142.
